name: VulDB API
description: VulDB is a vulnerability database providing comprehensive information about software vulnerabilities, exploits, countermeasures, and cyber threat intelligence (CTI). The API uses a single POST endpoint with various parameters to query vulnerability data, perform searches, and retrieve CTI information. All requests consume credits based on the query type and detail level.
